Quality Education.reason: The course is a PhD-level seminar, directly contributing to tertiary education (Target 4.3). Core Competency B explicitly mentions 'sustainability issues,' aligning with Target 4.7 on education for sustainable development.

Climate Action.reason: The mention of 'sustainability issues' (Core Competency B) provides a minimal, inferred link to climate change education and awareness (Target 13.3), as climate action is a key component of sustainability.
